svg.title: Zyn subdomain registration lifecycle flowchart
svg.desc: A top-down flowchart showing the 5 steps of Zyn subdomain registration: local key generation, availability check, zero-link registration with two sub-steps, text record storage, and event emission.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain local cryptographic key generation in the Zyn subdomain flow')
g.text: Browser generates spending & viewing keys → Stealth Meta-Address

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the isAvailable check work on the SubdomainRegistrar contract?')
g.text: isAvailable(name) on SubdomainRegistrar → queries ENS Registry for address(0)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why does Zyn set the Registrar contract as the ENS subdomain owner instead of the user wallet?')
sendPrompt('What is the StealthResolver and why is it used instead of the standard ENS resolver?')
sendPrompt('Why is the stealth meta-address stored on the official ENS Public Resolver instead of a custom database?')
sendPrompt('How does The Graph indexer pick up the NameRegistered event from the Zyn contract?')
g.text: NameRegistered(name, metaAddress) emitted → indexed by The Graph for dashboard

svg.text: Click any step to explore it further
